name: User Clicked Malicious Link from Spearphishing Email
description: Detects successful spearphishing attack where a user receives an email containing  a malicious link and subsequently accesses the suspicious domain. This model correlates SMTP traffic delivering the phishing email with HTTP connections to the same suspicious domain, indicating user execution of the malicious link.

filterSets.name: HTTP Connection to Malicious or Suspicious Domain
Spearphishing Email with Suspicious Link Received

author: Joshua Villaluz
